description:
REQ-030 Phase 2, item 4-5: Current stale detection only reports counts and auto-resets stuck tasks. Extend to emit actionable suggestions through the notification system.

Changes needed:
1. Add tiered suggestion logic in stale_in_progress_summary() or a new stale_task_intelligence() function:
   - 1x threshold exceeded → emit `stale-task-alert` with suggested_action: "warn" (task may be stuck)
   - 2x threshold exceeded → suggested_action: "re-assign" (agent may have failed silently)
   - 3x threshold exceeded → suggested_action: "escalate" or "split" (task may be too complex)
2. Include context in suggestion: task type, complexity, linked requirement, last workflow phase reached
3. Emit alerts through DaemonNotificationRuntime so they reach configured webhook/Slack channels
4. Add a `--suppress-stale-alerts` flag to DaemonRunArgs for environments where alerts aren't wanted
5. Add deduplication: don't re-emit the same alert for the same task on every tick (use a cooldown, e.g., 1 alert per task per threshold_hours period)
6. Add tests: task at 1x threshold gets warn, 2x gets re-assign, 3x gets escalate, deduplication prevents spam

Key files:
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/stale_in_progress.rs
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_notifications.rs
- crates/orchestrator-cli/src/services/runtime/runtime_daemon/daemon_scheduler_project_tick.rs
title: Add stale task intelligence with tiered action suggestions
